title: More Menu (Part 1/2)
heading: Tenders
text:
# Tenders Filter Past Tenders
To
Filter | Title | Description | Start Date | End Date | File |
| Notice Inviting Tender for Mahindra Bolero District Administration West Tripura | Notice Inviting Tender for Mahindra Bolero District Administration West Tripura | 10/03/2025 | 12/03/2025 | |
| It is hereby notified for general information that best price is to be settled through inviting e-tender for the period of April 2025 to March 2026 (12 months) of the license of foreign liquor warehouses to be effective at suitable premises as per the Tripura Excise Act and Rules amended time to time arranged by the interested parties within the broad area noted below as specified by the Government. | It is hereby notified for general information that best price is to be settled through inviting e-tender for the period of April 2025 to March 2026 (12 months) of the license of foreign liquor warehouses to be effective at suitable premises as per the Tripura Excise Act and Rules amended time to time arranged by the interested parties within the broad area noted below as specified by the Government. | 14/02/2025 | 10/03/2025 | |
| Notice Inviting Quotation through e-tender for supplying of Grocery Items, Fruits, Vegetable, Garments, clay article and Dairy Products in Government managed temples up to the period of February 2026. | Notice Inviting Quotation through e-tender for supplying of Grocery Items, Fruits, Vegetable, Garments, clay article and Dairy Products in Government managed temples up to the period of February 2026. | 11/02/2025 | 25/02/2025 | |
| On behalf of the Governor of Tripura, the undersigned invites sealed rate quotations in the plain paper from the interested, experienced and registered bidders/vender for “Supply of RO Filter” from 15th FC scheme under Belbari R.D. Block for Financial Year 2024-25″.
